nasb.text: “I feel compassion for the people because they have remained with Me now three days and have nothing to eat.

esv.text: “I have compassion on the crowd, because they have been with me now three days and have nothing to eat.

cnv.text: “我憐憫這一群人，因為他們和我在一起已經有三天，沒有甚麼吃的了。

ccb.text: “我怜悯这些人，他们跟我在一起已经三天，没有任何吃的了。

csbs.text: “我怜悯这群人，因为他们与我在一起已经三天了，也没有什么东西吃。
